content.en:
"The Strongest New True Ancestor!"

"The strongest True Ancestor power!"

"The strongest talent!"

Many people were stunned by Ye Tian's three talents, what kind of demon could he obtain these three ancient realm records!

Some of the ancient beings who thought that the True Ancestor was invincible were not convinced.

"If the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi only gets the strongest new True Ancestor, I have to be convinced, after all, his strength is invincible at the half-step True Ancestor level. But what is the situation of the strongest True Ancestor power and the strongest talent?"

"A mere new True Ancestor has actually obtained a record of the strongest True Ancestor's power, could it be that his True Ancestor's power is even stronger than ours?"

"Is this Xuanxu Ancient Realm record not Wanfa Daozi's family, and he is so partial to him!

Countless True Ancestors were not convinced, but the Xuanxu Ancient Realm Records would not listen to their opinions, if they could not break Ye Tian's records, then these three records would always exist on the Xuanxu List for future generations to admire.

At the same time, those True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force were also shocked by Ye Tian's three major records.

They didn't suspect that the records of the Ancient Realm were fake, because this could not be faked, even if the Invincible Dao Ancestor could destroy the Ancient Realm, there was no way to change the rules of the Ancient Realm, and there was no way to falsify.

For a while, they paid great attention to Ye Tian and thought that Ye Tian was a powerful enemy.

Some people even wanted to kill Ye Tian in advance, so as not to cause trouble for them in the future.

But soon, the Upper Triple Heaven Force got a message that Ye Tiannai was the reserve peak master of Black Wind Mountain.

All of a sudden, the Upper Triple Heaven forces stopped their plan to assassinate Black Wind Mountain.

It's not that they're afraid of Black Wind Mountain, it's that there's no need to offend Black Wind Mountain, the people of Black Wind Mountain are completely crazy people, and they can do it at any time.

If you offend Black Wind Mountain at this time and cause Black Wind Mountain to retaliate, it will be more than worth the loss.

Moreover, they have no hatred with Yetian, and the two sides may be able to cooperate in the future, so there is no need to assassinate Ye Tian.

......

The small realm of the Black Wind Mountains.

A True Ancestor-level powerhouse appeared in the originally empty small realm, and a dense group of True Ancestor-level powerhouses gathered here, and a meeting was being opened.

Presiding over the meeting was a general of the Black Wind Mountain, named General Blood, and there were at least thirty generals attending the meeting, and the other true ancestors were all at the peak master level.

As for the ordinary True Ancestors, they were not eligible to participate in this meeting.

There are many contents of this meeting, one is how Black Wind Mountain intervenes in the ancient realm, and the other is future plans and so on.

But soon, they explored a problem.

"Before, the Wind King summoned us, let's pay attention to a Preparatory Peak Lord, this Preparatory Peak Lord is a native of the Ancient Realm, I didn't care about this Preparatory Peak Master at first, but now this Preparatory Peak Lord has actually obtained three Ancient Realm records, he is definitely a real genius!"

After the bloody general finished speaking, the other generals and the peak master discussed Ye Tian one after another.

"That Wanfa Daozi named Ye Tian is already a true ancestor, and he should be qualified to inherit the position of the peak master, the number of peak masters is relatively scarce at present, and there is an urgent need to recruit manpower, otherwise how will our Black Wind Mountain recover in the next prosperous era?" a general spoke.

"Longli Peak Lord, you are the leader of Ye Tian, let him take the peak master assessment, and by the way, reveal the extraordinaryness of our Black Wind Mountain, lest he be poached by other Upper Triple Heaven forces!" General Bloody commanded.

I saw a huge figure with an incomparably burly, five-meter-tall figure standing up and responding, "Yes, General Bloody!"

Soon.

At the end of the meeting, one by one the generals and peak masters left.

And the Longli Peak Lord used the Peak Master Order to contact Ye Tian.

-------------------

Terran territory.

Ye Tian sensed that there was a message coming from the Preparatory Peak Master Order, and hurriedly took out the Preparatory Peak Master Order and accepted a message.

"Ye Tian, I am the Lord of the Dragon Power Peak of the Black Wind Mountain, and I am ordered by the Bloody General to be your guide of the Black Wind Mountain, and by the way, I will lead you to the Lord of the Black Wind Mountain Peak Assessment. I don't know if you have time recently, if you have time, you can enter the Wind King Small Realm to talk in detail!"

Accepting this message, Ye Tian's expression moved, "Black Wind Mountain has also been born!"

He didn't know much about Black Wind Mountain, he only knew that Black Wind Mountain's strength was not weaker than that of the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

If it is about the background, I am afraid that even Dao Mountain is far inferior to Black Wind Mountain.

He is already a reserve peak master, and one step further is the position of the peak master of Black Wind Mountain.

But do you want to become the peak master?

The Reserve Peak Master can also break away from Black Wind Mountain, but if he becomes the Peak Master, it will be difficult to get out.

After pondering for a while, Ye Tian made a decision-

Join!

If he wants to go further, then he must join a big force backer, although the Void Heaven Pulse is also relatively strong, but the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is just a new Quadruple Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Black Wind Mountain knew that he was a disciple of the Void Heaven Bloodline, but he didn't care about this, which showed that Black Wind Mountain was willing to make him the peak master.

Moreover, in the domain realm, many disciples of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces were often the true lineages or even elders of certain forces.

Moreover, Black Wind Mountain is not a real sect, just an organization, so which sect force he belongs to has little impact on Black Wind Mountain.

But he still asked the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's opinion.

Soon, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sent a message to let him enter the Black Wind Mountain and become the peak master, so that there would be more room for improvement in the future and he would not take a detour.

If he takes a detour, Ye Tian can become a Dao Ancestor, but it will be difficult to embark on the path of the Domain Ancestor.

So, Ye Tian sent a message to the Dragon Power Peak Lord and met with him in the Wind King Small Realm for a detailed discussion.

The small realm of the Wind King was the small realm that Ye Tian had entered, he was the first to enter this small realm, and soon a tall figure came in front of him.

"Ye Tian, it's really a bit of a struggle to find you, there are too many spaces in the small realm, and it took a lot of searching to find your space. Let's add friends, so that if we have a connection in the small realm of the Wind King, we can instantly appear in the same space!" said the Dragon Power Peak Lord.

"Could it be that the Wind King's small realm is more than just this space in front of you?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"Of course it's more than that!" Lord Long Li Feng explained: "A small realm is divided into 10,086 spaces, such as the space where the generals have meetings or detailed discussions are definitely not our space, such as some spaces are used for trading, some spaces are used to build cities, some true ancestors or even Dao ancestors will be stationed, or some spaces are used to store treasures and so on. In short, without reaching the position of the peak master, it is difficult to sense the existence of these spaces, and if others want to enter other spaces, they must pass through a specific teleportation array. As for the space you are in now, it is one of the abandoned spaces, or the dilapidated spaces. For example, the Wind King has also been hit hard and needs to be slowly recovered, and these spaces also need to be slowly recovered!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Before, he felt that this small realm was a bit low-grade, but now he realized that he knew too little.

"Let me introduce myself again, I am the Dragon Power Peak Lord of Black Wind Mountain, and I am ranked thirty-second among many peak masters in the late stage of cultivation, but the domain realm is broken in a battle, and many peak masters have fallen, and I should be ranked eighth now!"

"Ye Tian, the leader of the human race, a true disciple of the Void Heaven One Lineage, cultivating to the early stage of the Great Dao, preparing for the peak master!" Ye Tian also introduced himself.

"Ye Tian, your identity is clear to everyone, but you'd better use a backup identity, an identity that only exists in Black Wind Mountain, and don't use your identity in the outside world. The foundations of those of us in the domain are all gone, so we don't care if our identities are exposed or not, but you are different, you still have roots in the outside world. Maybe your alternate identity can't hide from the upper echelons of the Triple Heaven Forces, but as long as you hide it from others. You first take the peak master assessment, then take a peak master's name, and then receive a set of peak master clothes and peak master masks!" Long Li Peak Lord reminded.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

The Dragon Power Peak Lord took Ye Tian to another space in the Wind King Small Realm, which was specially used for assessment.

"Test the cultivation first, this is a necessary procedure!"

The main road of Longli Peak.

Ye Tian briefly tested his cultivation and proved that he really had the cultivation of the early stage of the Great Dao.

Subsequently, the second round of testing was to test Ye Tian's foundation, if someone forcibly used something that destroyed the foundation to ascend to the True Ancestor realm, then Black Wind Mountain would not accept such a True Ancestor who had no potential.

This round of testing was also no pressure on Ye Tian, and he passed easily.

The third round of assessment is combat power!

If the true ancestor is not strong enough, even if he is promoted to the late stage of the Great Dao or even the peak of the Great Dao, he will not be able to become the peak master, but can only become the peak master or the general's command.

After all, the hundred generals and the peak lord are strictly independent and unconstrained, and the bloody general is an exception, he is ordered by the Wind King to manage many generals and the peak master.

Long Li Feng mainly listened to the orders of the bloody general, but he did not need to listen to the orders of other generals.

It can be seen from this that the rights and treatment of the peak master are very good, so the requirements for combat power are also very high.

If the combat power is not high, wouldn't everyone be able to become the peak master!
